roa.docketEntryComment: DEF NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED

/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO TERMINATE PROBATION,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER OUTSTANDING MATTERS FROMTHIS PROBATION MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,19005707,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #18015546 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/CAL:DA MTR FILING/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REVOKE IS FILED,/X:ALAW CLERK APPEARED UNDER THE SUPERVISON OF STEVE OLMO, DPD,/09    DTS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S12/TBH:19005707/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:25000/

/CAL: APD RESTITUTION REPORT/DAWT/TN: MICHAEL RICHARD BALLARD/X: THERE ARE TWO VICTIMS (JOHN INGARGIOLA AND OUTSPOKEN BIKE RENTALS, JOHNINGARGIOLA IS THE OWNER OF OUTSPOKEN BIKE RENTALS AND REQUESTS RESTITUTION ONLY FOR HISBUSINESS IN THE AMOUNT OF  $250,00,/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR RESTITUTION & CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGEMENT SIGNED AND  FILED IN OPEN COURT AND SERVED TO DEFENDANT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT TO PAY VICTIM OUTSPOKEN BIKE RENTALS $250,00 PLUS FEE AND INTEREST AS INDICATEDON ORDER,/COLLECT/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST FILL OUT AND FILE CR 115,/X: NO FUTURE COURT DATES, DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ON PROBATION,

/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VIXTIM RESTITUTION ASTO THE VICTIM 'OUTSPOKEN BIKE RENTALS'/X:THE SECOND VICTIM JOHN INGARGIOLAHAS REQUESTED MORE TIME/CONT/DOPU:THE PD HAS THE AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ  6D  /CTS: 6  /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/X:RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY APD/CONTD:APD RESTITUTION/SA1:JOHN INGARGIOLA/SAORD/SAORD3/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/ORMS/GTWM/987,2/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/SA1:JOHN INGARGIOLA, ANDREW INGARGIOLA/SAORD3/SAORD/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 20/TRANS 20:FORTHWITH FOR TO SET DA MTR/
/CAL: TO SET DA MTR/NP/X:PER DEPUTY DEFENDANT 4011,5/CAUSE/TBH:19005707/CONT/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 29/TRANS 29:FORTHWITH FOR PLEA/
